findings.description: Console logging in production code
findings.suggestion: Use a proper logging library with level control, or remove before production

findings.description: addEventListener without corresponding removeEventListener — potential memory leak
findings.suggestion: Remove event listener in component cleanup / useEffect return

findings.description: setInterval without corresponding clearInterval — potential memory leak (clearInterval present in same file — verify teardown is wired to component lifecycle)
findings.suggestion: Confirm the interval ID returned here is passed to clearInterval in cleanup (e.g. useEffect return / componentWillUnmount).

findings.description: addEventListener without corresponding removeEventListener — potential memory leak
findings.suggestion: Remove event listener in component cleanup / useEffect return

findings.description: setInterval without corresponding clearInterval — potential memory leak (clearInterval present in same file — verify teardown is wired to component lifecycle)
findings.suggestion: Confirm the interval ID returned here is passed to clearInterval in cleanup (e.g. useEffect return / componentWillUnmount).

findings.description: Console logging in production code
findings.suggestion: Use a proper logging library with level control, or remove before production

findings.description: addEventListener without corresponding removeEventListener — potential memory leak
findings.suggestion: Remove event listener in component cleanup / useEffect return

findings.description: Empty catch block — errors silently swallowed
findings.suggestion: At minimum, log the error. Consider proper error handling or re-throw.

findings.suggestion: Use strict equality (===) instead
